abstract: Review an AWS architecture for cost waste, right-sizing opportunities, and pricing model improvements by examining IaC configurations, scaling policies, and resource provisioning in code.
not_for: security posture or IAM review (use security-assessment instead)
reliability or availability assessment (use reliability-improvement-plan instead)
sustainability or carbon footprint (use sustainability-optimization instead)
performance tuning or latency (use performance-efficiency instead)
full cross-pillar WA review (use wa-review instead)
